investReturnNote: Signet Baltic Bond Fund historic return, net of fees, nominal. Assumed while the pot stays invested, for both spending it down and living off the yield. Past performance is not a guarantee of future results.

salary._basis: Average NET (take-home) monthly wage, EUR, 2024. Methodology differs by country; refresh annually (Baltic wages rose ~9-11% in 2024).

EE.note: Gross-derived from Statistics Estonia 2024 gross (EUR 1,981) via 2024 tax rules; hard official anchor is Q1 2025 net EUR 1,526.

LV.note: Official full-year 2024 net (72.4% of gross EUR 1,685).

LT.source: Statistics Lithuania / Institute of Hygiene; Eurostat provisional

investReturn.basis: Fund historic return, net of fees, nominal (EUR UCITS, inception 09/05/2025). Factsheet 31/05/2026: 7.36% since-inception annualized, 7.76% trailing 12m, ~8.4% weighted-average YTM. Short track record, so shown with a past-performance disclaimer.
